name: nephrosense
description: NephroSense – run all microservices + frontend with one command

scripts.start: concurrently --names "donor-api,donor-ml,lifestyle,ultrasound,urine,gateway,frontend" --prefix-colors "green,yellow,magenta,cyan,blue,white,greenBright" "npm run service:donor-api" "npm run service:ml" "npm run service:lifestyle" "npm run service:ultrasound" "npm run service:urine" "npm run service:gateway" "npm run service:frontend"
